---
title: "Data Prep BDHS"
format: html
---


# Set up

<!-- set up stuffs -->

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```


# DHS 2022 GPS

```{r}
dhs_22_gps <- read_sf("../Data/Raw/DHS-2022-GPS/shapefile_2022/BDGE81FL.shp")
```

now have a look

```{r}
glimpse(dhs_22_gps)
```

The explantion of these variables are [here](../Data/Raw/DHS-2022-GPS/shapefile_2022/DHS_README.txt)


# BD DHS 2022

```{r}

```
